PlumbersElectriciansBuildersRoofersLocksmithsLandscapersHeating EngineersPest ControlCleanersDrainageJoinersPlasterersTilersCarpentersHandymen
The Problem

Why Roofers Lose Jobs to Missed Calls

Roofing is hands-on, high-risk work. You can't answer a phone while you're 30 feet up on scaffolding. But every missed call is a job that goes to your competitor.

Storm damage calls peak when you're already on a roof

When heavy rain hits, phones ring off the hook. But you're up a ladder, on scaffolding, or mid-repair. You physically cannot answer. Meanwhile, the caller dials the next roofer on Google.

Active leaks = customers who won't wait

A customer with water coming through their ceiling will call 3-4 roofers. The first to answer gets the job. If you're on a roof tiling, you miss it. That £320 emergency repair goes to your competitor.

You can't see the roof from a missed call

A voicemail saying 'my roof is leaking' tells you nothing. Is it a slipped tile (£150) or a full re-roof (£14,000)? Katie captures roof type, property age, leak location, and insurance status — so you arrive prepared.

After-hours calls from tenants and landlords pile up

Roofing emergencies don't stick to 9-5. Weekend storm damage, late-night leaks, bank holiday wind damage. While you're having dinner, missed calls stack up. By Monday morning, the jobs are gone.

Watch Whoza capture a missed enquiry in 60 seconds

Katie answers the call. The enquiry lands in WhatsApp. Claire requests the review. Rex shows what to improve next.

Stop the leak. Katie answers every call from just £59/month

How It Works

How Katie Works for Roofers

Four simple steps from missed call to booked job. Katie handles the conversation. You handle the roof.

1

Storm hits — phones start ringing

Katie answers every call with your roofing company's greeting. She identifies if it's an active leak, storm damage, or routine maintenance.

2

Roof-specific qualification

Captures: roof type (tile, slate, flat, metal), property age, leak location, insurance status, and whether photos are available. Active leaks get emergency priority.

3

WhatsApp with full context

Alert shows: 'Active leak — bedroom ceiling — 1930s semi — tiled roof — insured — photos available — urgent callback' with customer number and photo link.

4

Accept emergency or schedule survey

For active leaks: tap to accept and head straight there. For quotes: schedule a roof survey with time preference. Insurance work gets flagged for priority handling.

How Whoza Works

From missed call to captured enquiry — automatically.

01

We Set Up Whoza on Your Number

Forward your number to Whoza. Live and answering calls in 30 minutes. No tech skills, no engineers, no downtime.

30 min
02

We Answer Your Calls

Katie or Mark answers every call, qualifies the enquiry, and sends it to your phone.

24/7
03

You Accept Jobs and Get Paid

Real enquiries land on your phone. Tap to accept, call back or decline. Enquiry captured.

Instant
04

Only Continue If It's Working

See real results first. No upfront cost. Cancel anytime if it's not right for you.

No commitment

No website? No problem.

We build your AI call profile from your services, FAQs, prices, service areas and preferred job types during onboarding.

We only make money, when you make money

See how AI call handling works for your trade.

No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

Your AI Revenue Team

Meet Katie, Mark, Claire & Rex

Four AI specialists working together to answer calls, capture enquiries, collect reviews and show you what to improve next.

Call Capture

Katie

Female VoiceCustomisable

Katie answers calls 24/7, qualifies real customer enquiries, and sends them to WhatsApp while you work. Friendly, professional and calm under pressure - she helps customers feel heard before the enquiry reaches you.

Sample greeting:

"Hi, you've reached Thompson Plumbing. My name is Katie. How can I help you today?"

Ready to accept, call back or decline.

Call Capture

Mark

Male VoiceCustomisable

Mark answers calls 24/7, qualifies real customer enquiries, and sends them to WhatsApp while you work. Clear, efficient and professional - ideal if you prefer a direct male voice.

Sample greeting:

"Hi, you've reached Wilson Electrics. This is Mark speaking. What can I do for you?"

Job type, urgency, location and customer details captured.

Review Collection

Claire

Claire turns completed jobs into reviews

Claire follows up after completed work to request reviews while the customer still remembers the good service. Polite, timely and consistent - she helps turn good jobs into future trust.

Hi John, thanks for choosing Thompson Plumbing yesterday. If you were happy with the service, would you mind leaving us a quick review? It really helps. [Google review link]

More reviews. More trust. More customers choosing you.

Included in Growth plan and above.

Competitor Insights

Rex

Rex shows what to fix next

Rex checks your competitors, reviews and AI visibility, then turns the data into simple actions you can use each week.

Your nearest competitor has 41 reviews. You have 32. Action this week: request 5 more reviews from recent customers and reply to your last 3 Google reviews.

Clear weekly actions to improve visibility and help AI search recommend your business.

Monthly competitor analysis on every plan. Weekly actions from Growth upwards.

Choose the voice and name that fits your business. Switch anytime.

What happens after you sign up?

Live in less than 30 minutes. Here's how.

Step 1

Choose your AI assistant

Pick Katie, Mark, or choose any male or female assistant name you prefer.

Step 2

Select your voice and add your business details

Choose a male or female voice from the dropdown, then add your services, service area, hours, FAQs and preferred job types.

Step 3

We build your AI call profile and business knowledge base

Whoza creates the information your assistant uses to answer calls, qualify enquiries and route details correctly.

Step 4

You approve a test call

Listen to how your assistant handles a real-style customer enquiry and request edits if needed.

Step 5

Your Whoza agent goes live on your number

Once approved, your AI assistant starts answering calls and sending qualified enquiries straight to your phone.

Simple pricing that scales with your business. Most customers cover their cost in their first few jobs. Only continue if it's working for you.

Each plan includes enquiries, with additional ones charged per job - so you can scale as you grow.

Start small. Only pay more as you get more work.

Additional call handling minutes are charged at £0.26 per minute across all plans. You can monitor and control usage at any time.

AI Call Answering for Roofers in Your City

Katie answers calls for roofers across the UK. Find your location:

LondonManchesterBirminghamLeedsGlasgowBristolLiverpoolEdinburgh
Got Questions?

Roofer FAQ

Everything you need to know about AI call handling for roofing businesses

How much does AI call handling cost for roofers?

Whoza.ai starts at £59/month for the Starter plan. That's less than the cost of one missed emergency repair. Every plan includes unlimited AI calls, WhatsApp delivery, and a 7-day free trial. Overage minutes are billed at £0.26/minute. One captured £14,000 re-roof pays for 20+ years of service.

Can Katie handle storm damage emergencies at 2am?

Yes. Katie answers 24/7, including nights, weekends, and bank holidays. She identifies storm damage by keywords like 'leak', 'water coming through', 'storm damage', and 'wind damage' — and marks the enquiry as emergency priority. You get an immediate WhatsApp with 'STORM DAMAGE — URGENT' in the header.

What information does Katie collect from roofing customers?

Katie collects: full name, phone number, postcode, property type (house/flat/commercial), roof type (tile/slate/flat/metal), problem description (leak/storm damage/loose tiles/full re-roof), urgency level (routine/urgent/emergency), insurance status, whether photos are available, and how they found you.

Will customers know they're talking to AI?

Katie introduces herself as your AI assistant. Customers appreciate the honesty and the instant response. Most prefer a friendly AI that answers immediately over voicemail or a ringing phone. In our surveys, 89% of callers are satisfied with the AI experience.

Can Katie handle insurance roofing claims?

Yes. Katie specifically asks about insurance status and captures the insurance company name, policy number, and loss adjuster details when available. Insurance work is tagged as 'insurance' in your dashboard for specialised follow-up. These are often your highest-value jobs.

How quickly can I get set up as a roofer?

Most roofers are fully set up in under 30 minutes. You'll forward your existing business number to your new whoza.ai number, customize your agent's greeting, and you're live. No technical knowledge required. Katie starts capturing calls the same day.

What happens if Katie can't handle a complex roofing enquiry?

Katie is trained to recognise when she needs to transfer to a human. For complex queries, large commercial projects, or if the customer specifically requests you, she'll take a message and notify you immediately via WhatsApp and SMS. You can call them back within minutes.

Does whoza.ai work with my existing roofer phone number?

Yes. You simply forward your existing business number to your whoza.ai number. Your customers call the same number they always have — they just get answered every time instead of hitting voicemail. No need to change business cards, van signage, or Google listings.

Roofer Testimonial
"I was up a ladder in Didsbury when a storm hit. My phone rang 7 times in 2 hours. Katie captured every single call. One was a £12,000 re-roof job in Stockport. I called back at my tea break and booked the survey. Best £59 I ever spent."
JM

James Mitchell

Mitchell Roofing, Manchester

One Missed Re-Roof Pays for 20 Years of Katie

Emergency tile repairs average £200-400. Full re-roofs are £8,000-25,000. Insurance claims can exceed £50,000. At £59/month, capturing one missed job pays for the entire year.
